com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.guestdisplaymanager

Interface GuestDisplayManager

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface GuestDisplayManager
extends Module
    Provides the ability to operate Guest Display.

    How to get this module:

         GuestDisplayManager guestDisplayManager = (GuestDisplayManager)NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.GUEST_DISPLAY_MANAGER);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void clearScreen()
      Clears guest display screen.
      void displayBitmap(int leftTopX, int leftTopY, int bitmapWidth, int bitmapHeight, byte[] bitmapData)
      Displays bitmap in guest display screen.
      void displayString(int startX, int startY, java.lang.String content)
      Displays String content in guest display screen.
      void setBacklightStatus(boolean isBacklightOn)
      Sets the status of guest display screen backlight.

    • Method Detail

      • setBacklightStatus

        void setBacklightStatus(boolean isBacklightOn)
                 throws NSDKException
        Sets the status of guest display screen backlight.
        Parameters:
        isBacklightOn - Whether to set the backlight on.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • displayString

        void displayString(int startX,
                   int startY,
                   java.lang.String content)
            throws NSDKException
        Displays String content in guest display screen.
        Parameters:
        startX - [Required] The start X coordinate of the displayed content. Range: [0, 128]
        startY - [Required] The start Y coordinate of the displayed content. Range: [0, 4]
        content - [Required] The content to be displayed in the guest display screen.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • displayBitmap

        void displayBitmap(int leftTopX,
                   int leftTopY,
                   int bitmapWidth,
                   int bitmapHeight,
                   byte[] bitmapData)
            throws NSDKException
        Displays bitmap in guest display screen.

        Note: If the bitmap scope is beyond the screen, this will throw an exception.

        Parameters:
        leftTopX - [Required] The left-top X coordinate of the displayed bitmap. Range: [0,128]
        leftTopY - [Required] The left-top Y coordinate of the displayed bitmap. Range: [0,35]
        bitmapWidth - [Required] The width of the bitmap to be displayed.
        bitmapHeight - [Required] The height of the bitmap to be displayed.
        bitmapData - [Required] The displayed bitmap data.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • clearScreen

        void clearScreen()
          throws NSDKException
        Clears guest display screen.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
